from manim import *

class WaterfallModel(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Waterfall Model").scale(1.5)
        self.play(FadeIn(title))
        self.wait(1)

        rectangles = VGroup()
        for i in range(5):
            rect = Rectangle(width=2, height=1, color=BLUE)
            rect.shift(LEFT * (i + 1))
            rectangles.add(rect)

        self.play(Write(rectangles))
        self.wait(1)

        self.play(rectangles.animate.shift(UP * 2))
        self.wait(1)

        arrows = VGroup()
        for i in range(4):
            arrow = Arrow(start=LEFT * (i + 1), end=LEFT * (i + 2), buff=0.1)
            arrows.add(arrow)

        self.play(Write(arrows))
        self.wait(1)

        self.play(arrows.animate.shift(UP * 2))
        self.wait(1)

        self.play(FadeOut(rectangles))
        self.play(FadeOut(arrows))
        self.wait(1)

        text = Text("Requirements -> Design -> Implementation -> Testing").scale(0.8)
        self.play(FadeIn(text))
        self.wait(2)
